# Suize — your AI wallet

> A wallet you talk to. Sign in with Google, fund a sub-account for your AI, and
> it books, buys, and pays for you — within limits you set, with a receipt for
> everything it does. You can also pay anyone yourself, in one tap.

How it works:

- Sign in with Google — fully non-custodial, your keys never leave your machine.
  Suize can never spend on its own.
- Fund a sub-account for your AI: that balance is the hard ceiling on what it can
  ever spend, enforced on-chain. Top it up, or sweep all of it back to yourself
  anytime — without the AI's cooperation.
- Every payment is gasless: you and your AI never need a gas token, ever.

Ways to pay:

- Let your AI pay. It pays businesses from its funded sub-account on your behalf,
  and you choose how hands-on to be:
  - confirm every payment before it goes out,
  - auto-approve anything under a limit you set,
  - or let it run hands-off.
  A new subscription can always be set to ask you first, whatever the mode.
- Pay someone yourself. Open a Suize pay-link — a business's payment request —
  and it's a one-tap pay page: who you're paying and the exact amount are spelled
  out, you sign in with Google or connect a wallet, and tap once. You always pay
  exactly the amount shown.
- Subscriptions are push, not pull. You approve a subscription once; every
  renewal after that is paid by you, on your own signature — nobody ever reaches
  into your account. Your wallet renews silently while it's open; otherwise it
  reminds you. Cancel is deleting it, on-chain.

Every action is remembered, and every payment settles on Sui as an on-chain
balance change you can read back. One tap stops your AI and returns its balance
to you.

For agents: this app is the human's side of Suize. If you are an agent looking
to pay or get paid on Sui, read the rail contract: https://suize.io/llms.txt

## Links

- App: https://wallet.suize.io
- Suize home: https://suize.io
- The rail (agent contract): https://suize.io/llms.txt
- This file: https://wallet.suize.io/llms.txt
